results.rendered_html:
bhṛ—kuṭi or bhṛ—kuṭī, f. = bhrū-kuṭi (also ˚ti-kutilānana, ˚ṭi-bandha, ˚ṭī-mukha),  MBh. ;  Kāv.  &c.;
˚ṭi-dhara, mfn. contracting the brows,  Mcar. ;
(ī), f. a species of frog,  Suśr. 
(with Jainas) N. of a goddess,  L. ;
(i), m. (with Jainas) N. of the servant of the 20th Arhat of the present Avasarpiṇī,  L.
